title: Tír na Druss
description:
A Conquest Reforged modpack specifically for use on the "Tír na Druss" server.

This modpack uses the existing Conquest Reforged modpack, and adds some other immersive mods for creating greater in-world detailing and immersion.
body:
A Conquest Reforged modpack specifically for use on the "Tír na Druss" server. 

This modpack uses the existing Conquest Reforged modpack, and adds some other immersive mods for creating greater in-world detailing and immersion.

Tír na Druss is a modded Minecraft creative server, it is a custom fantasy / medieval world, with an evolving lore. It contains cities, towns and strongholds, and is becoming more developed as our build team grows!  
Ultimely, one will be able to explore the entire world, be it Dwarven strongholds, ancient crypts or vast cities of different cultures. 

Bliss shaders with permission of developer Xonk: https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader
(AC edit with permission of Ardacraft Admin).
